title: OverpAId – Fire your CEO. Hire the future
summary: OverpAId is a satirical AI tool that lets users 'fire' their CEO and replace them with an AI-generated executive. It critiques executive overcompensation by offering a chatbot that mimics a CEO's role, highlighting the absurdity of high pay versus AI automation. The Hacker News discussion debates AI's role in management and corporate governance.
